inputs.text: Bahut tezi se bukhar chadha hai, sir dard ho raha hai, bahut hi kamzor mehsoos ho raha hoon

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Symptoms of sudden onset fever and headache are common in Chikungunya

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever and headache are also seen in various viral fevers

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Although fever and headache are present, other specific symptoms of Dengue are not mentioned

inputs.text: Aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, bukhar abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic symptoms of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: While Chikungunya can cause joint pain, the specific combination of symptoms here leans more towards Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fevers can cause a range of symptoms, but the specific pattern here is less typical

inputs.text: Bukhar thoda kam ho gaya hai, lal daane nikal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of decreasing fever, appearance of rash, and bleeding gums are cardinal signs of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fevers can sometimes cause rashes, but the specific combination with bleeding and the pattern of fever is less typical

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria can cause fever and sometimes bleeding manifestations, but the pattern and combination of symptoms here fit Dengue more closely

inputs.text: Bahut kamzor mehsoos ho raha hoon, dehydration ho rahi hai, haalat bigaad raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The progression to severe weakness and signs of dehydration are consistent with the late stage of Dengue, especially if not properly managed

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the specific pattern of symptoms and signs of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out as the clinical picture does not align with typical malaria presentation
